query_title: Age of Uprising: The Legend of Michael Kohlhaas

recommendations.title: The Duchess
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of the life of 18th century aristocrat Georgiana, Duchess of Devonshire, who was reviled for her extravagant political and personal life.

recommendations.title: Amina
recommendations.overview: In 16th-century Zazzau, now Zaria, Nigeria, Amina must utilize her military skills and tactics to defend her family's kingdom. Based on a true story.

recommendations.title: Train Dreams
recommendations.overview: A logger leads a life of quiet grace as he experiences love and loss during an era of monumental change in early 20th-century America.

recommendations.title: Jobs
recommendations.overview: The story of Steve Jobs' ascension from college dropout into one of the most revered creative entrepreneurs of the 20th century.

recommendations.title: The Rising Hawk
recommendations.overview: During the 13th century, a small village fights for freedom in the frontier landscape of the Carpathian Mountains against Mongolian invaders.

recommendations.title: Caravaggio
recommendations.overview: A retelling of the life of the celebrated 17th-century Baroque painter Michelangelo Merisi da Caravaggio through his brilliant, nearly blasphemous paintings and his flirtations with the underworld.

recommendations.title: Luther
recommendations.overview: During the early 16th century, idealistic German monk Martin Luther, disgusted by the materialism in the church, begins the dialogue that will lead to the Protestant Reformation.

recommendations.title: Mongol: The Rise of Genghis Khan
recommendations.overview: The story recounts the early life of Genghis Khan, a slave who went on to conquer half the world in the 11th century.

recommendations.title: Braveheart
recommendations.overview: Enraged at the slaughter of Murron, his new bride and childhood love, Scottish warrior William Wallace slays a platoon of the local English lord's soldiers. This leads the village to revolt and, eventually, the entire country to rise up against Engli

recommendations.title: Cinco de Mayo: The Battle
recommendations.overview: On May 5th, 1862, a few thousand Mexican soldiers put their lives on the line against the world's largest and most powerful army in one legendary battle for freedom and for Mexico.
